@props(['method']) @php $type = match ($method) { 'GET', 'OPTIONS', 'ANY' => 'default', 'POST' => 'success', 'PUT', 'PATCH' => 'primary', 'DELETE' => 'error', default => 'default', }; @endphp <x-laravel-exceptions-renderer::badge type="{{ $type }}"> <x-laravel-exceptions-renderer::icons.globe class="w-2.5 h-2.5" /> {{ $method }} </x-laravel-exceptions-renderer::badge>
